{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230342347A74E964C50DB4708689"}"},"total":26},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613267957743338302","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，绝了呀，好喜欢女主宝宝摆烂呀，作者大大加油[已种草][书架加一][雀食神作][送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772605691,"group_id":"7605547489675987993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"依赖一个人久，感觉有点舍不得离开了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Pzgule94pmF/l6I2xjcHsaxpjw85iaYXLIGcU8Z2k2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6ff466a404a74b36877e88284cf1376b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791810&x-signature=1oMfzpejg3nZBCRuMdSNAIYwHVI%3D","user_id":"4222554341384236","user_name":"离梦月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4222554341384236","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1773838462,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605547489675987993","book_info":{"abstract":"1Vn 
鹿寻一睁眼，穿成高三孤儿。

无父无母，无亲无故，成绩垫底，全班当软柿子捏。

她刚想骂街，耳边叮的一声——

【摆烂就变强系统已绑定！】

行，那就不学了。

别人熬夜刷题，她倒头就睡——过目不忘到手。
别人课间加练，她趴着发呆——满级智商到账。
别人周末补课，她躺平追剧——神医、黑客、顶级资本马甲……奖励多到懒得数。

她以为这就是开挂。

直到月考成绩公布，常年倒数的孤儿学渣，全省第一。

曾经羞辱她的同学傻了，骂她“浪费教育资源”的老师哑了。


鹿寻懒得解释，继续摆烂。

直到高考那天，校门口突然驶入整排黑色车队，国徽闪耀。

紧随其后，专机跨越欧亚，径直降落。

华夏国士、国家首席科学家，站在她面前，眼眶通红。

欧洲暗夜主宰、千年神圣家族主母，携全欧权贵跨海而来，当众俯身行礼。

——她的亲生父母，找到了她。

还有七个哥哥三个弟弟。
后来系统升级位面商城，她随手开始修个仙。

某天敌国核弹来袭，全球直播陷入绝望。

鹿寻抬头看了一眼，伸手轻轻一挡。

核弹在半空无声湮灭。

全网跪拜，权贵低头。
她默默叹了口气：

“……我就想安安静静摆个烂，你们至于吗？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/806d5ba983a5277cb5949e435c11f210~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"薄荷梦境","author_id":"","book_id":"7605547489675987993","book_name":"觉醒摆烂系统后，不小心成了大佬","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":460,"name":"独宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=460&name=独宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":266,"name":"马甲","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=266&name=马甲&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605630761982493209","read_count":"30414","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"233974"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"105","tags":"现言脑洞,豪门世家,独宠,女强,无脑爽,马甲,扮猪吃虎","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/806d5ba983a5277cb5949e435c11f210~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392554&x-signature=jIbZQlees0O9JdDByMHIe%2B3ZcqM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3208836490999465","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230342347A74E964C50DB4708689 "}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9976,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13101,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":777},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773149963,"author_reply_time":1773149973,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616603016075313945","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在看过许多网文后，这篇小说虽然也是网文风格，但在阅读过程中和其他小说不同之处在于不仅仅是写的很精彩，主要是本人上了这么多年的学，做了这么多的努力，依旧没有达到学霸级别，真的是意难平。所以这篇小说的内容真的是写到了心坎里，奈何语文不好，不知如何描述本人心情，只想送礼表达心意，希望作者大大写作越精彩，文笔越好。","text_exts":[{"e":61,"s":57,"text":"这么多年","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%BF%99%E4%B9%88%E5%A4%9A%E5%B9%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774208554B4708689%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616603016075313945%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227605547489675987993%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%BF%99%E4%B9%88%E5%A4%9A%E5%B9%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773382784,"group_id":"7605547489675987993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N279kaq/d+qfx7AH912vyQg=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"818505276982573","user_name":"苍狼古城的梦芸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"818505276982573","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":1,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776924713,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605547489675987993","book_info":{"abstract":"1Vn
